name: canshare-who-bladder-site-histology
title: NZ WHO urinary bladder site histology
description: Histologies used for urinary bladder sites, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Urinary & Male Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 3. Tumours of the urinary tract, 9. Neuroendocrine neoplasms, 10. Mesenchymal tumours, 11. Haematolymphoid tumours, 12. Melanocytic lesions or an 'Other' value.
